comments: You may recognise the first track as a 'TV jingle'.
TV wishes Chris Aylmer all the best for the future after being replaced on bass in Samson.
Tracks are played in the first half by artists who are about to tour together: Gary Moore/Samson & Blue Oyster Cult/Aldo Nova.
The winner of the FNC had put together no fewer than 186 connections!

sessions.artist: Pretty Maids - repeat of session first broadcast 09 December 1983
Archive tracks by National Health from 1977
